steps.t: Hambrennil, the Tailor's Guild-leader is in the Guild-hall in Esteldín. The Master of Crafting Guilds has instructed you to speak with Hambrennil to l…
Jarmárr is in the Tailor's Guild-hall in Esteldín. Hambrennil has directed you to speak with Jarmárr to look at what recipes he sells.
Toby Eatwell is in the Tailor's Guild-hall in Esteldín. Hambrennil has directed you to speak with Toby Eatwell to look at what recipes he sells.
